name: Moxo
description:
What Moxo does

Moxo is a white label client portal tool  designed to automate the onboarding process of new clients or partners. It provides a seamless interface for client interaction during onboarding or project management.

It also integrates with other tools to ensure accurate record keeping. 

Source: Moxo

Key features

  • In-built security for data protection and privacy 
  • Custom templates to speed up the onboarding process of new clients and team members 
  • Integration with external tools
  • Reporting and insights for predicting:some text
    • Client behavior 
    • Sales projection
    • Overall performance 

Benefits of Using Moxo

The benefits of using Moxo includes:

  • Seamless client onboarding process
  • Due to the pre-built templates, work is done faster and more efficiently.
  • Agencies can adopt new strategies or adjust existing ones to better suit the client and agency needs.
  • The integration facilitates reliable sharing.
  • It helps to foster a strong relationship between the agency and the client.

Pricing

The pricing is based on the plan you want and the number of active users. You can book a demo to get an accurate quotation.

Pros

✅Automated features

✅Streamlined onboarding 

✅Time saving 

Cons

🚫The layout might be too sophisticated for some individuals
